title: selaginella sonneratii
intro: Selaginella sonneratii, also known as Spikemoss or Resurrection Fern, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella sonneratii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella sonneratii is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its dried leaves can also be used in capsule or tablet form for its medicinal benefits.
